[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001111 4
1 1000001 2
2 0100001 2
3 0000000 a
4 1010010 3
5 1101010 4
6 1111011 6
7 1000001 2

01 10 0101111 5
12 21 1001111 5
23 32 1100001 3
34 43 0100001 2 match 2
45 54 1010010 3 match 4
56 65 1011011 5
67 76 1111101 6
70 07 1110111 6

02 20 1100011 4
13 31 0101111 5
24 42 1000001 2 match 1 7
35 53 1110011 5
46 64 1001001 3
57 75 1110110 5
60 06 1101011 5
71 17 1111111 a

03 30 0100011 3
14 41 0001111 4 match 0
25 52 1010011 4
36 63 1101001 4
47 74 1110100 4
50 05 1110011 5
61 16 1001111 5
72 27 1110101 5

04 40 0100011 3
15 51 1011111 6
26 62 1001001 3
37 73 1110101 5
